---
title: "Project 1 Checkpoint 2"
format: html
---

```{r}
install.packages("tidytuesdayR")
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| label: load_data
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2021-01-26')
plastics <- tuesdata$plastics
```

```{r}
install.packages("purrr")
library(purrr)

#Is there a relationship between the number of volunteers and the amount of plastic produced across countries?
summ_plastics <- function(data) {
  data |>
    group_by(country) |>
    summarize(
      total_plastic = sum(grand_total, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_volunteers = sum(volunteers, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    summarize(
      correlation = cor(total_volunteers, total_plastic, use = "complete.obs")
  )
}

volunteers <- summ_plastics(plastics)

#Does the relationship between volunteers and plastic production change over time?
volunteer_results <- plastics |>
  split(plastics$year) |>
  map(summ_plastics) |>
  bind_rows(.id = "year")

#How did plastic production change between 2019 and 2020 for each country?
calc_plastic_difference <- function(data) {
  data |>
    group_by(country) |>
    summarize(
      plastic_2019 = sum(grand_total[year == 2019], na.rm = TRUE),
      plastic_2020 = sum(grand_total[year == 2020], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    mutate(
      difference = plastic_2020 - plastic_2019
    )
}

plastics_diff <- calc_plastic_difference(plastics)

#Which companies increased or decreased their plastic waste contribution from 2019 to 2020?
company_results <- plastics |>
  split(plastics$parent_company) |>
  map(~ .x |>
        summarize(
          plastic_2019 = sum(grand_total[year == 2019], na.rm = TRUE),
          plastic_2020 = sum(grand_total[year == 2020], na.rm = TRUE)
        ) |>
        mutate(difference = plastic_2020 - plastic_2019)
  ) |>
  bind_rows(.id = "parent_company")
```

```{r}
